  • Method Details

    • getInvestigation

      public InvestigationServiceGetInvestigationRequestBuilder getInvestigation()
      Get Investigations

      Use this endpoint to get the current state of an investigation by request reference UUID.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • getInvestigation

      public InvestigationServiceGetInvestigationResponse getInvestigation(String investigationId) throws Exception
      Get Investigations

      Use this endpoint to get the current state of an investigation by request reference UUID.

      Parameters:
      investigationId - The investigation id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      public InvestigationServiceUpdateInvestigationRequestBuilder updateInvestigation()
      Update Investigation

      Use this endpoint to update the details of an investigation by request reference UUID.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • updateInvestigation

      public InvestigationServiceUpdateInvestigationResponse updateInvestigation(String investigationId, InvestigationUpdate investigationUpdate) throws Exception
      Update Investigation

      Use this endpoint to update the details of an investigation by request reference UUID.

      Parameters:
      investigationId - The investigation id.
      investigationUpdate - Contains investigation details of corresponding investigation
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • updateInvestigation

      public InvestigationServiceUpdateInvestigationResponse updateInvestigation(String investigationId, Optional<String> updateMask, InvestigationUpdate investigationUpdate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Update Investigation

      Use this endpoint to update the details of an investigation by request reference UUID.

      Parameters:
      investigationId - The investigation id.
      updateMask - The list of fields to update. Updatable Fields: - identity_verification - investigation_request_state - watchlist_matches - watchlist_id - watchlist_item_id - match_state - exclude_from_screening - comment
      investigationUpdate - Contains investigation details of corresponding investigation
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listInvestigations

      public InvestigationServiceListInvestigationsRequestBuilder listInvestigations()
      List Investigations

      Use this endpoint to retrieve a list of investigation summaries based on optional search parameters

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • listInvestigationsDirect

      public InvestigationServiceListInvestigationsResponse listInvestigationsDirect() throws Exception
      List Investigations

      Use this endpoint to retrieve a list of investigation summaries based on optional search parameters

      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listInvestigations

      public InvestigationServiceListInvestigationsResponse listInvestigations(Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<String> filter, Optional<String> orderBy, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Investigations

      Use this endpoint to retrieve a list of investigation summaries based on optional search parameters

      Parameters:
      pageSize - The maximum number of records to return. Default is 50 The maximum is 200, values exceeding this will be set to 200
      pageToken - The page token used to request a specific page of the search results
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; Filter options include: ListInvestigationStatesResponse.investigation_states
      orderBy - The order in which investigations are listed. Only one field and direction can be specified. Supported fields (followed by 'asc' or 'desc'; 'asc' is default if left blank): - investigation_request_state - correspondent_id - scope - identity_verification - watchlist_screen - person.given_name - person.family_name - entity.legal_name - created_at - updated_at
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • linkDocuments

      public InvestigationServiceLinkDocumentsRequestBuilder linkDocuments()
      Link Documents

      Use this endpoint to update identity verification document IDs.

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • linkDocuments

      public InvestigationServiceLinkDocumentsResponse linkDocuments(String investigationId, LinkDocumentsRequestCreate linkDocumentsRequestCreate) throws Exception
      Link Documents

      Use this endpoint to update identity verification document IDs.

      Parameters:
      investigationId - The investigation id.
      linkDocumentsRequestCreate - Custom request - adds identity verification documentIds to investigation request
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • linkDocuments

      public InvestigationServiceLinkDocumentsResponse linkDocuments(String investigationId, LinkDocumentsRequestCreate linkDocumentsRequestCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Link Documents

      Use this endpoint to update identity verification document IDs.

      Parameters:
      investigationId - The investigation id.
      linkDocumentsRequestCreate - Custom request - adds identity verification documentIds to investigation request
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      customerIdentificationId - The customerIdentification id.

      The response from the API call

      Exception - if the API call fails

    • getCustomerIdentification

      public CustomerIdentificationResultServiceGetCustomerIdentificationResponse getCustomerIdentification(String correspondentId, String customerIdentificationId, Optional<? extends CustomerIdentificationResultServiceGetCustomerIdentificationQueryParamView> view, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Get Identity Verification

      Gets a CustomerIdentification by CustomerIdentification ID.

      Parameters:
      correspondentId - The correspondent id.
      customerIdentificationId - The customerIdentification id.
      view - Optional. The view to return. Defaults to BASIC.
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
